title: Parse Pagination Query Params Safely in Go
summary: Parse page and page_size query parameters with defaults, validation, and a fixed maximum in Go.
verification_notes: Executed from the snippet root with Go 1.24.4 on macOS. Verified behavior covers valid page and page_size parsing, missing values, page size capping, invalid integers, non-positive values, invalid default pages, invalid default page sizes, invalid max page sizes, and surrounding whitespace.
